zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland於大約1170年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利時，他的父親Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland31歲，母親Alesta nic Morggán of Mar11168歲。他於1200年與Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland was born about 1170, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, was 31 and his mother, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, was 11168. He married Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus in 1200, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1246, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland est né environ 1170, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, avait 11168 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus en 1200, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1246, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland um 1170 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland 31 und seine Mutter Alesta nic Morggán of Mar 11168. Er hat 1200 in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus nel 1200, nel Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandが約1170年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで生まれた時，父Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotlandは31歳，母Alesta nic Morggán of Marは11168歳であった。1200年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーでBeatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで77歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alesta nic Morggán of Mar(은)는 11168세였다. 그는 1200년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, tinha 11168 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus em 1200, em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1246, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Paisley Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland: пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland родился около 1170 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, 11168. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus в 1200 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1246 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
